testcase.name: test_stake_below_minimum_is_rejected[negative_whole-home]

failure.message: pydantic_core._pydantic_core.ValidationError: 1 validation error for BetErrorResponse error Field required [type=missing, input_value={'message': 'Bet placed s... 121, 'currency': 'USD'}, input_type=dict] For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing
